title: Splatter Screen for Cooking, Perforated Stainless Steel,13 Inch Stainless Steel Grease Splatter Guard, Comfortable Grip, Shield from Splashing Oil
features: 【SPLASH-PROOF AND HANDS-FRIENDLY】Our splatter screen attaches to the handle of the cookware, effectively blocking the splashes of oil when frying steaks or the hot oil when deep-frying spring rolls, so you can say goodbye to burns and blisters, and make pot mats and oven mitts unnecessary.

【EASY TO CLEAN AND KEEP TIDY】This frying pan splatter guard acts as an attentive cleaning assistant, whether it's for everyday frying or complex deep-fried meals, it keeps kitchen walls, countertops, fridges and cupboards free from grease and saves a lot of cleaning time, so you can enjoy your meal while it's still hot at the end of the cooking process.
【WIDE APPLIED TO VARIOUS POTS】Whether it's the usual pots and pans you use at home or the flat frying pans used by professional chefs, our oil splatter guards are perfectly adapted to them.

【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL, DURABLE AND RELIABLE】Splash guard is made of perforated stainless steel with fine and delicate mesh. Even in the case of high temperature overheating, it always keeps the color as new, durable and will not fade or deform.

【EASY TO CLEAN AND VERSATILE】Cleaning the splatter screen after cooking is stress-free and it can be washed directly in the dishwasher without rusting. In addition to frying and simmering food, it can be used when you need to check the status of your food and worry about spills, It can also be used as a draining and straining tool, or even as a cooling rack for desserts, this 13 inch splatter screen meets the most needs of your cooking scenarios.
